title: symphytum circinale
intro: Symphytum circinale, also known as creeping comfrey, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Symphytum circinale include its use as a natural anti-inflammatory, its potential to improve bone health, and its ability to support the growth of new tissue. Herbal preparations of Symphytum circinale can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
